<!-- Adding or fixing a directory entry? Tick the boxes so review is quick. -->

## What does this PR add or change?

<!-- e.g. "Adds <project> under OP-XY > Tools & software" -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The project is **TE-specific** (a real Teenage Engineering device).
- [ ] The link **works** and has **no trailing slash**.
- [ ] It's in the right **device** section and **job-to-be-done** sub-heading.
- [ ] Entry is one line: `- [Name](url) - one sentence on why it matters, ending with a period.`
- [ ] I added a status tag (`(archived)` / `(dormant)` / `(WIP)`) if it isn't actively maintained.
- [ ] I updated the Table of Contents if I added a new section.
- [ ] It's something I'd actually recommend (curate, don't collect).
